overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Zero Dawn showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a tribal waterfront settlement at dusk. The character moves along wooden docks and elevated walkways past stone architecture, palm trees, and NPC villagers, with misty water and dramatic pink skies in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock approach to stone archway entrance

events.description: character turns left from facing water to walk along the dock

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wooden dock toward stone archway entrance, glancing at water

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the waterfront dock
thick wooden post with rope bindings
calm water surface with low mist hovering above
red rock formations rising from the water
large stone archway with carved details marking settlement entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a misty waterfront dock at dusk, with Aloy standing on weathered wooden planks. She turns left and walks along the dock toward a large stone archway entrance, passing wooden support posts and stilted buildings. The pink sky reflects on the calm water as she approaches the settlement gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone passage with ascending stairs

events.description: enters covered stone archway from open dock area
emerges from dark stone corridor back into natural dusk light

agents.ego_description: walking up stone stairs through covered stone corridor toward the exit

entered.detail: stone steps leading upward through the archway
rough-hewn stone walls of the covered passage
tall stone gate frame with decorative carvings

segments.scene_description: Aloy enters the covered stone archway, leaving the open dock behind. She ascends stone stairs through a narrow corridor illuminated by warm hanging lanterns. The stone walls enclose the path until she approaches the exit, where palm trees and the pink sky become visible through the gate ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical boardwalk with palm trees and stilted shacks

events.description: exits stone gate into open marshy area with palm trees and wooden shacks

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated wooden boardwalk past stilted shacks and palm trees

notable_agents.action: villager standing near wooden railing looking out at the water

entered.detail: elevated wooden walkway with railings extending through the settlement
tall palm trees lining both sides of the path
rustic wooden hut built on stilts over the marshy ground
misty mountain rising behind the palm trees

segments.scene_description: Exiting the stone gate, Aloy emerges into a tropical waterfront area with tall palm trees silhouetted against the pink dusk sky. She walks along an elevated wooden boardwalk past stilted shacks, while a few NPC villagers stand near the railings. The atmosphere is misty with mountains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront market with stalls leading to fire pit overlook

events.description: enters market area with wooden stalls and barrels
approaching large fire brazier casting warm flickering light

agents.ego_description: walking through market stalls toward waterfront fire pit, passing villagers

notable_agents.action: merchant standing near stacked wooden barrels
villager leaning against market stall awning

entered.detail: wooden market stalls with fabric awnings and goods displayed
stacked wooden barrels near the market tables
large metal fire pit with flames burning brightly
tall carved stone pillar near the waterfront edge

segments.scene_description: Aloy walks into a bustling market area with wooden stalls and stacked barrels, where moderate crowds of NPC villagers gather. She continues past merchants and villagers toward a large fire brazier burning at the waterfront edge. The scene ends with an open view of the misty water and distant structures beyond the firelight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, misty waterfront dock through a stone gateway and into a bustling tribal settlement at dusk. It begins with Aloy walking along weathered wooden planks toward a large stone archway, with the pink sky reflecting on the calm water. As she enters the covered archway, the open air is replaced by a narrow stone corridor illuminated by warm hanging lanterns before she ascends stairs toward a distant light. The scene then opens back up into a tropical area where she traverses an elevated boardwalk lined with palm trees and stilted shacks under a misty, mountainous horizon. Finally, the path leads into a crowded market filled with wooden stalls and barrels, moving past gathering villagers toward a burning fire brazier at the water's edge.
